caption:
The Japanese Chef Revolutionizing Pizza 🍕🇯🇵 

#pizza #japanesefood #tokyo #japan #foodie #travel #chef #cheflife #thedrunkensommelier #pizzeria #pizzaiolo
transcript: this is the godfather of japanese pizza his name is yutaka hazama and he's a japanese pizza maker revolutionizing pizza in japan japan is known for having some of the best pizzerias in the world having the number 2 13 and 66 best ranked pizzerias in the world among the many things that sets yutaka apart from his fellow pizza makers in japan is his innovation to only use 100 japanese flour and even rice flour to make his pizzas secret despite this yutaka is still a certified pizza napolitano maker he's placed multiple times in the world championship of pizza making in naples and taught himself how to speak italian he also convinced one of the best pizza oven makers in the world a napolitano named ernesto to fly all the way from naples to tokyo to build his pizzeria's oven from scratch despite his ability to make a true napolitano styled pizza yutaka is breaking all the rules and making pizzas that would probably make any italian nona faint on site but yutaka doesn't care he's blazing his own trail and is dedicated to making pizza unique to japan and to himself i've eaten hundreds of pizzas in italy myself from naples to sicily to milan and can attest that yutaka's pizza in tokyo goes head to head with the best he uses a classic wood-fired oven fueled by his stockpile out front he even brews his own beers on site to specifically pair with his pizzas has he ever told someone from naples that he makes pizza with rice flour
